input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.12.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.12.3
            TITLE: missed slalom

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.12.3: Missed Slalom
D.12.12.3 Missed Slalom 
Missing one or more gates of a given slalom will be counted as one Off Course

final_answer: rule D.12.12.3: Missed Slalom Missing one or more gates of a given slalom will be counted as one Off Course
